description_long: This is a semi-circular chaise with a dark wooden frame and a woven rattan backrest that wraps around the sides and rear, creating an inviting, enclosed seating area. The seat and back are fitted with thick, cream-colored cushions that provide comfort and contrast with the darker frame. The backrest is gently curved and rises to a medium height, offering support while maintaining an open, airy feel. The legs are straight and sturdy, made from the same dark wood as the frame, and are positioned to support the rounded structure. The woven rattan adds a natural, textured element, while the smooth cushions give a soft, plush appearance. This piece would be well-suited for urban parks, patios, or stylish public seating areas.
description: A semi-circular chaise with a dark wood frame, woven rattan backrest, and plush cream cushions, combining comfort and natural texture.
description_view_0: Rear view showing the curved, woven rattan backrest and the dark wooden frame, with the cream cushion peeking over the top.
description_view_1: Angled side view highlighting the rounded frame, woven rattan texture, and the thickness of the seat and back cushions.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the full seat and back cushions, the open seating area, and the gentle curve of the backrest.
description_view_3: Opposite angled side view emphasizing the continuous curve of the frame and the integration of the rattan and wood materials.
attribute_backrest_design: The backrest is medium height, semi-circular, and constructed from woven rattan framed by dark wood. It curves smoothly around the seat, providing partial enclosure and visual texture.
attribute_armrest_presence: The chaise has integrated armrests formed by the continuous curve of the backrest on both sides.
attribute_leg_style: The legs are straight, sturdy, and made of dark wood, positioned at the front and rear to support the rounded frame. They have a simple, functional design with no visible decorative elements.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: The upholstery is solid cream-colored fabric with a smooth, unpatterned surface, giving a clean and modern appearance.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: There are two loose cushions: one large, rounded seat cushion and one rectangular back cushion, both in cream fabric. The cushions are thick and plush, placed to maximize comfort within the curved frame.
